comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *sethjones* To complete the [pull request process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process), please assign **rhatdan** after the PR has been reviewed. You can assign the PR to them by writing `/assign @rhatdan` in a comment when ready. The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@sethjones thanks for the PR.  Our CI isn't accepting it as you didn't sign the commit.  Can you do `git commit --amend -s` and then repush?
Otherwise LGTM.

Quick hint: use the 'Edit' button at top right on the Github web page for this PR, change the title to include the prefix '[CI:DOCS]' (bracket, CI, colon, DOCS, bracket). This will save you much agony and time.

You need to squash your commits.

git rebase -i origin
Squash down to a single signed commit
git push --force
Changes LGTM, but CI is still unhappy
